---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible issue in the site
labels: bug
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to ...
2. Click on ...
3. Scroll to ...
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- Device: [e.g., MacBook Pro]
- OS: [e.g., macOS 15]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 136]
- Page URL: [e.g., /sessions/construir-un-resume-de-clase-mundial]

## Screenshots or logs

Add screenshots, console errors, or build logs if available.

## Additional context

Anything else that can help us diagnose faster.
